# Ranjan Sharma

> Ranjan Sharma (also known online as Konsept / konseptt) is a USA-based cybersecurity engineer and software engineer. This is his official personal portfolio and entity home at https://ranjansharma.info.np/.

Ranjan Sharma codes "anything and everything" - lately in Rust and TypeScript. His recent work spans programming-language and compiler design, AI-powered research tools, autonomous-vehicle simulation, and security applications, across 50+ public repositories.

## Profiles
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/konseptt/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/konseptt)

## Latest projects
- [LyangLang](https://github.com/Konseptt/LyangLang): A programming language and compiler with Nepali-language syntax, written in Rust.
- [Synapse Research](https://github.com/Konseptt/synapse-research): Biomedical research intelligence - PubMed search with instant evidence overviews.
- [Clinical Trial Matcher](https://github.com/Konseptt/clinical-trial-matcher): Search international clinical-trial registries using a patient's clinical details.
- [Interview Question Predictor](https://github.com/Konseptt/interview-question-predictor): Paste a job description and get the 15 most likely interview questions.
- [Rust Autonomous Vehicle Simulation](https://github.com/Konseptt/Rust-Autonomous-Vehicle-Simulation): Self-driving cars using neural networks trained by a genetic algorithm (Rust, Bevy). Demo: https://youtu.be/BzCkSsQmezE
- [HashPass](https://hashpass.ranjansharma.info.np/): Generate secure passwords using a hashing algorithm.
- [Code to Image](https://codetoimage.ranjansharma.info.np/): Turn code snippets into polished, shareable images.
- [3D SHM Visualization](https://shm.ranjansharma.info.np/): Interactive 3D Simple Harmonic Motion physics tool (p5.js / WebGL).
- [Streamline - YouTube Clone](https://youtube.ranjansharma.info.np/): Minimalist video streaming platform (React, Material UI).

## Skills
Cybersecurity, penetration testing, web application security, Rust, systems programming, compiler and programming-language design, AI / LLM application development, React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Java, C, C++, MongoDB, MySQL, Django, REST APIs, data structures and algorithms, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS.
